# Learning in Public

> Aggregating all open learning projects by [@bkmashiro](https://github.com/bkmashiro).

| Project | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [paper-a-week](https://github.com/bkmashiro/paper-a-week) | Weekly ML & systems paper analysis + implementation |
| [build-your-own-x-mini](https://github.com/bkmashiro/build-your-own-x-mini) | Minimal systems from scratch (< 200 lines) |
| [visual-cs](https://github.com/bkmashiro/visual-cs) | Algorithm & data structure visualizations |
| [creative-lab](https://github.com/bkmashiro/creative-lab) | Daily creative coding demos — [cl.yuzhes.com](https://cl.yuzhes.com) |

See the [full README](../README.md) for philosophy, stats, and roadmap.
